brightsmith_specReference.amendmentTrigger: §5 Option-C amendment (2026-04-30): §2 Decision 3 was amended from single-source IPEDS Finance FTE to a hybrid COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, raw.eada.eada_fte_headcount) with explicit fte_source provenance, raising EADA-FTE coverage from 74.5% to ~100% and avoiding NULL-ing the 521 (~25.5%) institutions — predominantly 2-year colleges (NJCAA / CCCAA / NWAC) — that are missing from base.ipeds_finance. The amendment requires raw.eada to expose EADA's in-file `EFTotalCount` column as `eada_fte_headcount` (double). The pre-amendment bronze.eada snapshot (5935703872733658125, 10 columns, 2026-05-01T04:02:38Z) did NOT carry this column. This re-ingest emits the post-amendment snapshot (2061189972643103988, 11 columns, 2026-05-01T19:44:35Z) with eada_fte_headcount sourced from EFTotalCount (column index 13 in InstLevel.xlsx, 168 source columns total). Source data unchanged — only the column extraction widened. Per §8 Lineage amendment line, the pre-amendment event at governance/lineage/full-pipeline-eada-20260501T040238Z.json is preserved as historical record; this NEW event is its chronological successor.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Re-ingest of bronze.eada to add the eada_fte_headcount column required by §5 Decision 3 Option-C (hybrid FTE source). EadaIngestor was extended with a new column extraction reading EADA's `EFTotalCount` column (lowercase-tolerant; actual column header in InstLevel.xlsx is mixed-case `EFTotalCount`) and coercing it to Iceberg double via the same _strip_sentinel → _coerce_double pipeline used for the three monetary fields. All other extraction logic — UNITID long coercion, suppression-sentinel scrubbing ('', '-1', '-2' → NULL), institution-totals-by-construction (no in-pipeline filter; INSTITUTION_TOTAL_FILTER_COLUMN=None), reporting_year stamping from DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR=2022 — is unchanged from the pre-amendment ingestor. Source data is byte-identical to the previous run: data/raw/eada_cache/eada_2022.csv (2,040 rows × 168 columns). Row count is unchanged (2,040 → 2,040) because the CSV is one-row-per-UNITID by construction; widening the projection adds a column, not rows. All 12 P0/P1 DQ rules from governance/dq-rules/raw-eada.json were re-executed against the new snapshot and PASS (10 P0 + 2 P1, zero violations) — the column-addition is regression-clean. No new DQ rule was added for eada_fte_headcount in this re-ingest pass; coverage assertions on the new field land at base zone (BSE-EAD-* will assert has_eada_fte ≈ 100%) per §5 schema.
brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoningContinued: Per §8 amendment, the pre-amendment lineage event at governance/lineage/full-pipeline-eada-20260501T040238Z.json (snapshot 5935703872733658125, 10 columns) is intentionally NOT modified — it remains as the historical record of the original ingest. This new event is the chronological successor and references the new snapshot (2061189972643103988, 11 columns). The two events live side-by-side under the spec basename `full-pipeline-eada-*`. The dangling-snapshot risk @fp-data-reviewer flagged in §7 issue (c) is resolved by this explicit dual-event hygiene — every snapshot in the table's history maps 1:1 to a lineage event.

documentation.description: Land the EADA Athletics Disclosure Survey institution-totals file (InstLevel.xlsx) into Iceberg table bronze.eada. Same job as the pre-amendment run (5935703872733658125); this run extends the column projection to include EADA's `EFTotalCount` (12-month enrollment headcount) as `eada_fte_headcount` per §5 Option-C. Single entity, one row per UNITID per academic reporting year. Cache-first reads from data/raw/eada_cache/eada_<year>.csv with the live SPA backend at https://ope.ed.gov/athletics/api/dataFiles/file?fileName=EADA_<YYYY-YYYY>.zip as the refresh path. Filters to institution-total rows (no-op for InstLevel.xlsx by construction), scrubs EADA suppression sentinels ('', '-1', '-2') to NULL before numeric coercion, coerces UNITID to Iceberg long with explicit handling of int/float/quoted-string/leading-zero variants, coerces all four monetary/headcount fields (GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE, GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE, RECRUITEXP_TOTAL, EFTotalCount) to Iceberg double, and stamps reporting_year=2022 from DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR (academic-year-start convention). Framework metadata (source_url, source_method, ingested_at, load_date) appended by BaseIngestor.ingest() post-flatten.

dataSource.name: EADA 2022-2023 InstLevel.xlsx (CSV cache)
dataSource.provider: U.S. Department of Education, Office of Postsecondary Education

fields.name: unitid
fields.description: EADA identity column — lowercase in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'UNITID'). EDA-pinned 2026-04-30. May arrive as int, float, quoted string, or leading-zero string.

fields.name: institution_name
fields.description: EADA identity column — lowercase in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'INSTNM'). EDA-pinned 2026-04-30.

fields.name: GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE
fields.description: Total athletic expenses for the institution. EDA-pinned 2026-04-30 — actual column name in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'EXP_TOTAL_TOTAL'). May contain EADA suppression sentinels ('', '-1', '-2').

fields.name: GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE
fields.description: Total athletic revenue for the institution. EDA-pinned 2026-04-30 — actual column name in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'REV_TOTAL_TOTAL'). May contain EADA suppression sentinels.

fields.name: RECRUITEXP_TOTAL
fields.description: Recruiting expenses for the institution. EDA-pinned 2026-04-30 — actual column name in InstLevel.xlsx (NOT 'RECRUITEXP_TOTAL_TOTAL'). May contain EADA suppression sentinels.

fields.name: EFTotalCount
fields.description: EADA's in-file 12-month enrollment headcount for the institution. NEW INPUT (added 2026-04-30 per §5 Option-C). Column index 13 in the 168-column InstLevel.xlsx CSV header. NOT identical to IPEDS Finance's annualized total_fte_enrollment — Knight Commission's per-FTE athletic-spend benchmarks use this column. May contain EADA suppression sentinels.

schema.note: InstLevel.xlsx has 168 columns total; this re-ingest reads 6 of them (the 5 read by the pre-amendment run plus EFTotalCount). The remaining 162 columns (per-sport breakdowns, demographic splits) are intentionally not ingested at bronze.

inputFacets.fileSourceFormat: Excel (InstLevel.xlsx) pre-converted to CSV during EDA

fields.name: unitid
fields.description: IPEDS institution ID. Iceberg field id 1, grain field. Coerced from any of int/float/quoted-string/leading-zero variants in the source CSV.

fields.name: reporting_year
fields.description: EADA reporting cycle (academic-year-start convention; 2022 = the 2022-2023 cycle). Iceberg field id 3. Pinned per ingest from DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR; the EADA file has no in-row year column.

fields.name: total_athletic_expenses
fields.description: GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 4.

fields.name: total_athletic_revenue
fields.description: GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 5.

fields.name: recruiting_expenses
fields.description: RECRUITEXP_TOTAL coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 6.

fields.name: eada_fte_headcount
fields.description: EADA's in-file `EFTotalCount` (12-month enrollment headcount) coerced to double after suppression-sentinel scrub. Iceberg field id 7. NEW FIELD added 2026-04-30 per §5 Option-C amendment to support hybrid COALESCE FTE source at base.eada (COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, raw.eada.eada_fte_headcount)). Expected non-null on ~100% of rows per EDA.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: EADA landing page URL stamped on every row by EadaIngestor.get_source_url() — points at https://ope.ed.gov/athletics/ rather than a transient bulk URL so audit trails remain stable across runs. Iceberg field id 8.

fields.name: source_method
fields.description: Fetch-path provenance: 'csv_cache' (default cache-first path) or 'bulk_csv_download' (when bulk_url kwarg supplied). Set post-hoc by EadaIngestor.ingest() to reflect the actual fetch path. Iceberg field id 9.

fields.name: ingested_at
fields.description: Bronze write timestamp stamped by BaseIngestor.ingest(). Iceberg field id 10.

fields.name: load_date
fields.description: Date of bronze load stamped by BaseIngestor.ingest(). Iceberg field id 11.

schema.schemaEvolutionNote: Single column added (eada_fte_headcount, double, optional) at field id 7. Field IDs 8–11 (source_url, source_method, ingested_at, load_date) shifted from their pre-amendment positions (7–10) because the new column was inserted before the framework metadata fields rather than appended at the tail; this is a logical-position change only — Iceberg field IDs are stable per Iceberg's schema-evolution semantics so downstream readers that key on field ID (not position) are unaffected. No type changes, no required-flag flips on existing fields, no field deletions.

unitid.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_long(row['unitid']): coerces the lowercase 'unitid' EADA column to int (Iceberg long). Handles all observed source variants — int, float (truncated), quoted string (strips single/double quotes), and leading-zero string. Returns None on failure; rows with None UNITID are dropped with a WARNING log line (none observed in the 2022 re-ingest). NaN floats are also rejected. bool values are explicitly excluded (bool is a subclass of int in Python). Unchanged from predecessor event.

institution_name.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_string(row['institution_name']): str() then .strip(). Empty strings collapse to None, but the bronze schema marks institution_name required=true — DQ rule RAW-EAD-002 (P0) enforces 100% non-null on the grain. Unchanged from predecessor event.

reporting_year.transformationDescription: Stamped from EadaIngestor.reporting_year (defaults to DEFAULT_REPORTING_YEAR=2022) on every row. The EADA file does not carry an in-row year column — reporting_year is encoded only in the cache filename (eada_<year>.csv). Academic-year-start convention: 2022 = the 2022-2023 cycle. DQ rule RAW-EAD-010 (P0) verifies single-value invariant across all 2,040 rows. Unchanged from predecessor event.

total_athletic_expenses.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE'])): two-stage transform. (1) _strip_sentinel maps EADA suppression sentinels ('', '-1', '-2' as stripped strings) to None — applied BEFORE coercion so the sentinel '-1' does not survive as numeric -1 and trigger RAW-EAD-004. (2) _coerce_double strips currency formatting (',' and '$'), parses to float, rejects NaN. Zero sentinel hits observed in 2022 (per EDA). Unchanged from predecessor event.

total_athletic_revenue.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE'])): same two-stage sentinel-then-coerce pattern as total_athletic_expenses. Zero sentinel hits observed in 2022. Unchanged from predecessor event.

recruiting_expenses.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['RECRUITEXP_TOTAL'])): same two-stage sentinel-then-coerce pattern as the other monetary fields. Zero sentinel hits observed in 2022. Unchanged from predecessor event.

eada_fte_headcount.transformationDescription: EadaIngestor._coerce_double(_strip_sentinel(row['EFTotalCount'])): NEW EXTRACTION (added 2026-04-30 per §5 Option-C amendment). Same two-stage sentinel-then-coerce pattern used for the three monetary fields — (1) _strip_sentinel maps '', '-1', '-2' → None before coercion; (2) _coerce_double strips currency formatting (none expected on a headcount column but the helper is reused for consistency), parses to float, rejects NaN. Source column is at index 13 in the 168-column InstLevel.xlsx CSV header. Observed values in this run are positive integers (e.g., row 0 unitid=100654 EFTotalCount='4792' → 4792.0). Stored as double rather than long to match the type used downstream by base.eada.total_fte_enrollment (which is a COALESCE of an annualized double FTE from base.ipeds_finance with this 12-month integer headcount; double is the lossless common type). Methodologically NOT identical to base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment — eada_fte_headcount is a 12-month enrollment headcount, total_fte_enrollment is an annualized FTE — so base.eada will stamp an explicit fte_source provenance column rather than silently mixing the two definitions.

source_url.transformationDescription: Stamped from EadaIngestor.get_source_url() = BULK_URL_TEMPLATE = 'https://ope.ed.gov/athletics/' on every row. Deliberately points at the human-facing landing page rather than the SPA-backend bulk download URL so audit trails remain stable across runs (the SPA fileName parameter changes per cycle). Unchanged from predecessor event.

source_method.transformationDescription: Set post-hoc by EadaIngestor.ingest() override to the actual fetch path: 'csv_cache' (cache-first default; what this 2026-05-01 re-ingest used — same cache file as the predecessor run, byte-identical) or 'bulk_csv_download' (when bulk_url kwarg supplied). Unchanged from predecessor event.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-injected by BaseIngestor.ingest() — UTC timestamp at bronze write time. New value for this snapshot reflects the re-ingest moment, not the predecessor run.

load_date.transformationDescription: Framework-injected by BaseIngestor.ingest() — date component of the bronze write timestamp. New value for this snapshot reflects the re-ingest moment.

dataQualityAssertions.scorecardNote: DQ rules re-executed against the new snapshot 2061189972643103988; the same 12-rule set in governance/dq-rules/raw-eada.json was used unchanged (no new rule was added for eada_fte_headcount in this re-ingest pass — coverage assertions on the new field land at base zone via BSE-EAD-* per §5 schema). All 12 rules PASS with zero violations against the re-ingested snapshot, matching the predecessor run's result. The pre-existing scorecard file is referenced as the canonical 12-rule definition; the assertions array below records the rule-by-rule re-execution verdicts for this snapshot.
dataQualityAssertions.regressionVsPredecessor: PASS — same 12/12 verdicts as predecessor run against the column-widened snapshot; the column-addition is regression-clean. Per spec amendment, no new chaos run is required for a column addition because the 12 DQ rules pass which is the regression check.

assertions.name: reporting_year is single value across all rows
Spot check: at least one row total_athletic_expenses > $100M (D1 anchor)
Row count within 1% of distinct UNITIDs (filter regression tripwire)
